name: availability: an existing OVERNIGHT booking blocks an overlapping HOURLY selection on the same room (B9/F17)
comment: The inverse of fixture 37, and the direction that would break first if hourly had been given its own availability path. recB0 occupies the only room from today 14:00 SAST until tomorrow 10:00; the short-stay guest asks for 15:00 today for one hour, which sits entirely inside that. Guest returns to AWAITING_HOURLY_DETAILS to offer a different time, and the pending row keeps its blank Check Out — still inert, and reused rather than duplicated when they try again.
